texto: Meditate on the unique relationship between Christians. Psalm 133:1 proclaims the goodness and pleasantness of dwelling together in unity
autor: there are some things in the world that are good but not pleasant and others that are pleasant but not good. But to live in peace is both pleasant and good.
explicacao: Citação de there are some things in the world that are good but not pleasant and others that are pleasant but not good. But to live in peace is both pleasant and good. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Meditate on the unique relationship between Christians.
